claim: Build edge-to-cloud video anomaly detection: embed videos on edge (NVIDIA Jetson), detect anomalies via vector similarity, send only anomalies to cloud for deeper analysis
actionable: For video surveillance at scale, use edge embeddings to filter normal content and reduce cloud bandwidth by 90%; only send anomalies for expensive cloud analysis.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Thierry Damiba: Edge to Cloud Video Anomaly Detection

claim: Detect anomalies by learning baseline behavior, then flagging dissimilar (not similar) vectors; focus on false negatives over false positives in anomaly detection
actionable: For anomaly detection systems, optimize for sensitivity (catch real anomalies) over specificity (avoid false alarms); missing true anomalies is worse.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Thierry Damiba: Edge to Cloud Video Anomaly Detection

claim: Qdrant Edge runs vector search on edge devices; syncs baseline back to cloud for updates, enabling persistent context without retraining
actionable: Use vector databases designed for edge (Qdrant Edge) to enable cross-device synchronization of learned baselines.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Thierry Damiba: Edge to Cloud Video Anomaly Detection

claim: Achieved 94% recall on video anomaly detection with 2 false positives per hour on 30-second clips; vector search enables semantic search through anomalies
actionable: Use semantic vector search for anomaly investigation workflows; operators can search for patterns across detected anomalies instead of manual scrubbing.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Thierry Damiba: Edge to Cloud Video Anomaly Detection
